name: Workers comp paid my bills but now wants repayment—why?
description: They may seek subrogation if a third party caused your injury. You keep pain & suffering damages, but they recover medical payments from that settlement.

mainEntity.name: Workers comp paid my bills but now wants repayment—why?

acceptedAnswer.text: They may seek subrogation if a third party caused your injury. You keep pain & suffering damages, but they recover medical payments from that settlement.
